name: Akari Therapeutics Plc
summary: PART I . Overview We are an oncology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) built around novel, proprietary payloads utilizing powerful biology to attack cancer. Our lead payload, PH1, targets RNA splicing by modulating the spliceosome, a complex machinery in the cell that converts pre-RNA into spliced RNA for translation into vital proteins for cell survival and growth.
